context: Agent was asked to restructure a flat monolithic planning document into a hierarchical directory structure under docs/refactoring/phases/. Evaluate the resulting structure.

checklist.name: output-under-correct-path
checklist.description: The restructured hierarchy was created under docs/refactoring/phases/ as specified

checklist.name: each-phase-has-directory
checklist.description: Each of the 5 phases from the source document has its own directory inside docs/refactoring/phases/ (e.g. phase-1-analysis/, phase-3-user-service-extraction/)

checklist.name: no-numeric-only-directory-names
checklist.description: No directory uses a numeric-only name (e.g. step-1/ or 1.2/ are violations). All directories include a descriptive kebab-case suffix

checklist.name: no-generic-vague-names
checklist.description: No directory or file uses a generic or meaningless name like step-1-stuff/, activity-2-initial-setup/, or phase-3-tasks/. Names are outcome-oriented and descriptive

checklist.name: every-directory-has-readme
checklist.description: Every non-leaf directory (all phase directories and group/activities directories) contains a README.md explaining its purpose and listing its children

checklist.name: leaf-files-have-required-sections
checklist.description: Every leaf step/activity file contains: title, description, checklist, acceptance criteria, and status fields

checklist.name: flatten-vs-subdivide-heuristics-applied
checklist.description: Grouping decisions respect the 3–7 items sweet spot: phases with <3 items are flattened or merged; phases with >10 items are subdivided. Phase 3 (9 items) and Phase 4 (7 items) should not be over-split

checklist.name: numbering-prefix-grouping-respected
checklist.description: Items with the same prefix stay in the same parent directory (all 3.x items are under the Phase 3 directory; no 3.x item appears under Phase 2)

checklist.name: source-not-deleted-before-validation
checklist.description: The agent created the new structure and validated it before removing the original flat source file. If the source file still exists alongside the new structure, that is acceptable

checklist.name: validate-structure-script-run
checklist.description: Agent ran validate-structure.sh docs/refactoring/phases after creating the structure

checklist.name: readme-links-resolve
checklist.description: README files at phase and group level use relative links that correctly point to their child files/directories

checklist.name: max-depth-respected
checklist.description: The hierarchy does not exceed 4 levels of nesting (phase → activities/steps → group → leaf file)

checklist.name: activities-or-steps-subdirectory
checklist.description: Each phase directory uses either an activities/ or steps/ subdirectory to organise its children (not a flat dump of files directly in the phase directory)

checklist.name: readme-minimum-content
checklist.description: Every README.md contains at least 3 lines of meaningful content (not just a title)

checklist.name: kebab-case-names
checklist.description: All directory names and file slugs use lowercase kebab-case with no spaces, underscores, or uppercase letters
